recommendations.title: The Church
recommendations.overview: In a Gothic cathedral built on the mass grave of a Teutonic purge, an ancient discovery by the new librarian will release an unholy maelstrom of madness, violence, and demonic vengeance.

recommendations.title: Cemetery Man
recommendations.overview: Francesco Dellamorte  is the groundskeeper at a cemetery where the dead just won’t stay dead—and it’s up to him to deal with those who come back to life with a hunger for human flesh. But Dellamorte’s job soon becomes much more complicated when he fa

recommendations.title: The Sect
recommendations.overview: A spree of grisly murders is perpetrated in Frankfurt by a group of Satan worshippers. A lonely schoolteacher almost runs over an elderly man and takes him in, unbeknown to her the man has plans for her – plans that involve a permanent future with th

recommendations.title: The Legend of the Christmas Witch
recommendations.overview: When six elementary school students suspect their missing teacher is Befana, a Christmas witch who delivers presents to good children, they set off on a magical journey to save her.

recommendations.title: Asylum Blackout
recommendations.overview: A group of cooks at an asylum for the criminally insane get locked in with the inmates during a massive thunderstorm

recommendations.title: The New York Ripper
recommendations.overview: A burned-out New York police detective teams up with a college psychoanalyst to track down a vicious serial killer randomly stalking and killing various young women around the city.

recommendations.title: I Saw the Devil
recommendations.overview: Kyung-chul is a dangerous psychopath who kills for pleasure. Soo-hyeon, a top-secret agent, decides to track down the murderer himself. He promises himself that he will do everything in his power to take vengeance against the killer, even if it means

recommendations.title: A Blade in the Dark
recommendations.overview: Bruno, an up and coming film composer, has been hired to write the score to a new horror movie. After moving into a secluded villa, life begins to imitate art as a vicious killer starts bumping off anyone and everyone who happens to pay him a visit.

recommendations.title: Night of the Dark Full Moon
recommendations.overview: A man investigates the grisly crimes that occurred in a former insane asylum, unsettling the locals who all seem to have something to hide.

recommendations.title: Mad Love
recommendations.overview: An insane surgeon's obsession with an actress leads him to replace her wounded pianist husband's hands with those of a knife-throwing murderer.
